# Meal Bear Skardu

> On-demand food delivery service in Skardu, Gilgit-Baltistan, Pakistan. Delivers from local restaurants to homes, offices, and hotel rooms. Cash on Delivery.

## Key Pages
- Homepage: https://www.mealbear.pk
- Restaurants: https://www.mealbear.pk/restaurant/[id]
- About: https://www.mealbear.pk/about
- Contact: https://www.mealbear.pk/contact

## Coverage Area
Skardu city, Gilgit-Baltistan, including hotel delivery and residential areas such as Katpanah, Sundus, and surrounding neighborhoods.
